# Lunex DEX
> Non-custodial decentralized exchange on the Lunes Network (Substrate/Polkadot). Spot trading, copy trading, margin, AI agents, social trading, and governance in one protocol.

## Core Files
- [README.md]: Project overview and quick start
- [spot-api/src/index.ts]: API server entry point
- [spot-api/src/routes/]: 15 REST API route modules
- [spot-api/src/services/]: 24 business logic services
- [spot-api/prisma/schema.prisma]: Database schema
- [lunes-dex-main/src/]: React frontend (Vite)
- [contracts/]: ink! smart contracts (Rust)
- [sdk/]: TypeScript SDK for external integrations
- [subquery-node/]: Block event indexer
- [docs/API.md]: Full API reference
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md]: System architecture and ADRs
- [docs/DEPLOYMENT.md]: Production deployment guide

## API Base URL
`/api/v1` — REST over HTTP + WebSocket on port 4001

## Key Concepts

- **sr25519 Signatures**: All wallet writes (orders, follows, deposits) require a Substrate sr25519 signed message with a nonce
- **Admin Bearer Token**: Route guarded admin operations (pair registration, listing activation, payout batches)
- **Agent API Key**: AI trading agents authenticate with `lnx_<key>` via `X-API-Key` header
- **Nonce Replay Protection**: All nonces stored in Redis with TTL to prevent replay attacks
- **Order Matching**: FIFO price-time priority in-memory orderbook, persisted to PostgreSQL
- **Smart Router V2**: Automatically selects best execution source (Orderbook / AMM / Asymmetric)
- **Affiliate Commission**: 5-level referral chain, rates: 4% → 3% → 1.5% → 1% → 0.5%
- **Copy Trading**: Leader creates a vault; followers deposit LUSDT; vault mirrors leader trades
- **Staking Tiers**: Agents stake LUNES to unlock higher trading limits (4 tiers)

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Backend API | Express 5, TypeScript 5, Zod |
| Database | PostgreSQL 15, Prisma ORM |
| Cache/Nonces | Redis 7 |
| Frontend | React 18, Vite, styled-components |
| Blockchain | Lunes (Substrate/Polkadot), Polkadot.js |
| Contracts | ink! 4.x (Rust) |
| Indexer | SubQuery (GraphQL) |
| Observability | Pino logs, Prometheus metrics |

## API Modules

| Module | Prefix | Auth |
|--------|--------|------|
| Pairs | `/pairs` | Public / Admin |
| Orders | `/orders` | sr25519 |
| Trades | `/trades` | Public |
| Orderbook | `/orderbook` | Public |
| Candles | `/candles` | Public |
| Smart Router | `/route` | Public / Agent Key |
| Social | `/social` | Public / sr25519 |
| Copy Trade | `/copytrade` | Public / sr25519 / Leader Key |
| Margin | `/margin` | sr25519 |
| Affiliate | `/affiliate` | Public / Admin |
| AI Agents | `/agents` | Public |
| Asymmetric | `/asymmetric` | Agent Key |
| Listing | `/listing` | Public / Admin |
| Governance | `/governance` | Public |

## Environment Variables (critical)

- `DATABASE_URL` — PostgreSQL connection string
- `REDIS_URL` — Redis connection string
- `ADMIN_SECRET` — Bearer token for admin routes
- `RELAYER_SEED` — Relayer wallet for on-chain settlement
- `LUNES_WS_URL` — Lunes node WebSocket endpoint
- `FACTORY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS` — Deployed AMM factory
- `SPOT_CONTRACT_ADDRESS` — Deployed spot contract
- `SUBQUERY_ENDPOINT` — Optional: SubQuery indexer URL
